helpful: The complete provisioned petition made the vehicle and split arguments assessable.
The statpack supplied fee-class, circuit, relist, and CVSG calibration.
CourtListener supplied the controlling 2025 Supreme Court opinion and the cited circuit authorities.
gaps: No brief in opposition was provisioned because respondents waived response.
The prompt references a salience-band base-rate table, but the committed statpack did not contain one.
notes: The first uv invocation encountered a read-only runner cache; redirecting the temporary uv cache to /tmp restored the CLI. The corpus query was usable but expensive for a low-information comparison.
